name: SkyData UAV
description: Drone façade surveys and high-rise condominium inspections for structural engineering and construction firms.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Part 107 licensed pilots with specialized expertise and equipment
Advanced 3D modeling enables you to pinpoint deficiencies and produce organized timely reports

sentiment.summary: SkyData UAV is a highly credible drone survey provider with extensive experience, proper FAA/OSHA compliance, and strong professional credentials.

name: Sunshine State Aerial Inspections
description: High-resolution aerial inspections of buildings, roofs, post-storm damage, bridges, power lines, solar panels.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: The footage was thorough, professional, and delivered with impressive clarity.
Highly recommended for anyone needing top-notch drone inspection services!
Working with Joe for the drone inspection was a game-changer.

sentiment.summary: Exceptional positive review praising professional expertise, thorough inspection work, and outstanding image quality with strong recommendation.
